name: 16S_V1_Bacteroidetes
description: 16S rRNA hypervariable region V1 in phylum Bacteroidetes. Approximately 30 bp on the E. coli numbering scheme (positions 69-99). Gram-negative anaerobes, dominant gut; e.g. Bacteroides, Prevotella. Species- to genus-level discriminating; real biological variation expected — allow high mismatch during mapping.
